title: 3PL Supply Chain Visibility Platform
tagline: Real-time shipment and inventory visibility for third-party logistics
description: B2B dashboard and APIs giving operators a single view of orders, warehouses, and carrier events.

caseStudy.summary: Unified visibility layer across WMS, TMS, and carrier webhooks.
caseStudy.businessValue: Reduced exception handling time by giving ops teams one timeline per shipment instead of three portals.
caseStudy.architecture: React SPA talks to FastAPI services; Postgres as system of record; async workers for carrier ingestion.

title: Legacy Lease & Billing Migration Engine
tagline: Desktop tooling to extract, transform, and validate lease billing data
description: PySide6 application replacing spreadsheet-driven lease workflows with validated migrations into a modern billing schema.

caseStudy.summary: Guided migration wizard with dry-run validation before cutover.
caseStudy.businessValue: Cut manual reconciliation cycles and de-risk billing cutover with repeatable migration profiles.
caseStudy.architecture: Desktop UI over SQLAlchemy ORM; profile-driven ETL from legacy exports to target schema.
